name: overview_lifecycle
hypothesis: Compose proposer A's restraint (left-aligned headline, no counting copy, single moment per section, ghost link footer) with proposer C's strongest asset (the horizontal animated lifecycle SVG with three packets riding a single rail) to give /overview a single substrate-flow moment between Partners and 'How it earns' — without touching index.astro, components, or globals.
mechanisms: Single new vault Section inserted between Partners marquee and 'How it earns' (no other structural changes).
Headline is mechanism-named ('How a request flows through the protocol.'), left-aligned per linear_tier pattern, NOT count-named.
Eyebrow is 'REQUEST FLOW' (semantic, non-overlapping with hero's 'TANGLE PROTOCOL').
Lede narrates the actual mechanism (router → operator instance → tools → snapshot → x402 settlement) — no adjective stacking.
SVG diagram retains C's geometry (viewBox 0 0 1280 240, six rounded-rect nodes on a 60→1240 rail, three packets via animateMotion+mpath at 7s with -2.3s/-4.6s offsets).

Vault recolor: nodes shifted from #1D1B38→#141328 (dark indigo) to #ffffff→#f4f4f9 (white→vault), labels from #A5AAFC to #4F46E5 (5.42:1 on white), captions from #C5C5DC to #3a3a50 (10.5:1 on white), backing rail dash bumped from 0.18α to 0.32α, edge-gradient indigo bumped from 0.10/0.55/0.10 to 0.18/0.7/0.18 — keeps the indigo→emerald packet identity but every text/bg pair clears AA.
Indigo packets shifted from #A5AAFC/#818CF8 (designed for dark) to #4F46E5/#6366F1 (saturated for white). Emerald 'settled' packet moved from #34D399 to #059669 for AA on white.
Six-cell legend below the diagram with deeper indigo dots, dark-on-light text, router.tangle.tools chip with brand-tinted bg.
BILL node carries emerald-tinted border + emerald label so the settlement endpoint is visually distinct from the indigo flow.
Lifecycle steps factored into a typed array at the frontmatter level (lifecycleSteps) so node geometry/copy is data-driven — keeps the JSX clean and matches Astro idiom.
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) keeps the static diagram (nodes, rail, arrows) and hides only the four moving packet circles.
Section-foot ghost link 'Read the protocol spec' → docs.tangle.tools (single CTA, left-aligned, matches A's restraint).

smokeTest.devServer: astro dev on random port (4247) booted in 2845ms, /overview returned HTTP 200 (170199 bytes)

markers.ov-life-stage: present (2 occurrences — one container + one CSS hook)
markers.ov-life-path: present (single SVG path id used by mpath references)

smokeTest.buildOutput: Astro 6.0.8 build completed; /overview/index.html emitted in +16ms; only pre-existing @import-order warning.

designDecisions.biggestCall: Recoloring C's dark-mode SVG for vault rather than wrapping the diagram in a dark inset card. A dark inset would have broken the dark→vault→dark rhythm operator wanted (Hero/Stats/Partners are dark; this section needed to be light); recoloring kept the indigo→emerald packet narrative intact while every text/bg pair clears AA on white.
designDecisions.headlineRationale: 'How a request flows through the protocol.' — mechanism-named, period-terminated like /home Linear-tier section heads, no count, distinct from hero eyebrow ('TANGLE PROTOCOL') and section eyebrow ('REQUEST FLOW').
designDecisions.eyebrowColor: #047857 (emerald, 5.5:1 on white) — same color the global vault cascade forces for var(--brand-cool); keeps the eyebrow palette consistent with the rest of /overview's vault sections.
designDecisions.alignment: Headline + lede left-aligned (Linear-tier pattern), diagram itself centered full-width inside the stage card, ghost link left-aligned at section foot — single visual axis for the whole moment.
